auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact the administrator.
auth.tooManyLoginAttempts: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start exploring
auth.regSuccessMessage: You can now sign in with your new account.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit verification code.
auth.accountNotFound: This account does not exist or has not been activated.
auth.forgotGenericError: An error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.checkInboxSentTo: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
auth.checkInboxInfo: The code expires in 10 minutes. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
auth.resendSuccess: A new verification code has been sent!
auth.resendError: Failed to resend. Please try again.
auth.otpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
auth.otpExpiredError: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.otpInvalidError: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
auth.otpInfo: The code expires in 10 minutes. Check your spam folder if not received.
auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Your identity has been verified. Please enter your new password.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.googleLoginError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.passwordWeakError: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
auth.loginPanelDesc: Discover 200+ amazing destinations with thousands of travelers who trust Azure Horizon.
auth.registerPanelDesc: Join 50,000+ travelers experiencing the smartest and most affordable way to book tours.
auth.registerFeature1Desc: Track booked tours and your dream destination list
auth.registerFeature2Desc: Exclusive discounts and travel combos for members only
auth.registerFeature3Desc: Expert travel advisors always ready to assist you
auth.registerTestimonialQuote: The tour booking experience is extremely easy! Beautiful interface and very dedicated support team.
auth.registerPanelTagline: Register in 30 seconds · SSL secured · No spam
auth.forgotPanelDesc: Follow 3 simple steps to securely reset your password and get back to your journey.
auth.forgotPanelStep2Desc: Check your inbox and enter the code
auth.forgotPanelStep3Desc: Create a strong password for your account
